title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid bootstrapped Chatbase to $10M ARR without external funding, reaching $1M ARR in 117 days. The video covers his playbook including product-led growth, SEO/AEO strategy, pricing experimentation, and churn reduction tactics that enabled rapid scaling.
